  const customPath = process.env.CUSTOM_STORAGE_PATH || '';
---
---
.next/server/chunks/[root-of-the-server]__251d160c._.js.map:{"version":3,"sources":["../../../src/lib/db.ts","../../../src/lib/paths.ts","../../../src/app/api/transmittals/%5Bid%5D/upload/route.ts","../../../node_modules/next/dist/esm/build/templates/app-route.js"],"sourcesContent":["import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'\n\nconst globalForPrisma = globalThis as unknown as {\n  prisma: PrismaClient | undefined\n}\n\nexport const db =\n  globalForPrisma.prisma ??\n  new PrismaClient({\n    log: ['query'],\n  })\n\nif (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') globalForPrisma.prisma = db\n\n/**\n * Auto-seed the database with default categories, disciplines, and doc types\n * if they don't exist yet. This runs once on first server start and prevents\n * \"Foreign key constraint violated\" errors when creating transmittals.\n *\n * Each main category gets its own set of sub-disciplines (with labelEn for\n * bilingual support), so the user doesn't have to add them manually.\n */\nlet seedPromise: Promise<void> | null = null;\n\nexport async function ensureSeedData(): Promise<void> {\n  if (seedPromise) return seedPromise;\n  seedPromise = (async () => {\n    try {\n      // Check if disciplines exist\n      const discCount = await db.discipline.count();\n      if (discCount > 0) return; // already seeded\n\n      console.log('[seed] Database empty — seeding default data...');\n\n      // Create main categories (with labelEn for bilingual UI)\n      const categories = [\n        { code: 'TRANSMITTAL', label: 'ترانسميتال', labelEn: 'Transmittal', icon: '📄', color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700', templatePath: '/api/templates/TRANSMITTAL', templateType: 'xlsx' },\n        { code: 'MIR',         label: 'تفتيش مواد', labelEn: 'Material Inspection', icon: '📦', color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700', templatePath: '/api/templates/MIR', templateType: 'xlsx' },\n        { code: 'CHECK_LIST',  label: 'تشيك ليست',  labelEn: 'Check List', icon: '✅', color: 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-700', templatePath: '/api/templates/CHECK_LIST', templateType: 'xlsx' },\n        { code: 'RFI',         label: 'طلب معلومات', labelEn: 'Request for Information', icon: '❓', color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' },\n        { code: 'BOOKS',       label: 'كتب',         labelEn: 'Letters', icon: '📚', color: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700', templatePath: '/api/templates/BOOKS', templateType: 'docx' },\n      ];\n      for (const cat of categories) {\n        await db.category.upsert({\n          where: { code: cat.code },\n          create: cat,\n          update: { label: cat.label, labelEn: cat.labelEn, icon: cat.icon, color: cat.color, ...(cat.templatePath ? { templatePath: cat.templatePath, templateType: cat.templateType } : {}) },\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Create disciplines — each main category gets its own set of sub-disciplines\n      // Format: code, label (ar), labelEn (en), color, prefix, categoryCode\n      const disciplines = [\n        // TRANSMITTAL — 6 standard disciplines\n        { code: 'CIV',  label: 'المدنية',     labelEn: 'Civil',          color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',   prefix: 'CIV-',  categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'EL',   label: 'الكهربائية',  labelEn: 'Electrical',     color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700', prefix: 'EL-',   categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'PL',   label: 'الصحي',       labelEn: 'Plumbing',       color: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700',     prefix: 'PL-',   categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'HVAC', label: 'التكييف',     labelEn: 'HVAC',           color: 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700',     prefix: 'HAVC-', categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'FF',   label: 'الحريق',      labelEn: 'Fire Fighting',  color: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',       prefix: 'FF-',   categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'ELVE', label: 'المصاعد',     labelEn: 'Elevators',      color: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700', prefix: 'ELEV ', categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n\n        // MIR — material inspection disciplines (5)\n        { code: 'MIR-CIV',  label: 'مواد مدنية',     labelEn: 'Civil Materials',      color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',   prefix: 'MIR-CIV-',  categoryCode: 'MIR' },\n        { code: 'MIR-EL',   label: 'مواد كهربائية',  labelEn: 'Electrical Materials', color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700', prefix: 'MIR-EL-',   categoryCode: 'MIR' },\n        { code: 'MIR-PL',   label: 'مواد صحية',      labelEn: 'Plumbing Materials',   color: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700',     prefix: 'MIR-PL-',   categoryCode: 'MIR' },\n        { code: 'MIR-HVAC', label: 'مواد تكييف',     labelEn: 'HVAC Materials',       color: 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700',     prefix: 'MIR-HVAC-', categoryCode: 'MIR' },\n        { code: 'MIR-FF',   label: 'مواد حريق',      labelEn: 'Fire Materials',       color: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',       prefix: 'MIR-FF-',   categoryCode: 'MIR' },\n\n        // CHECK_LIST — checklist disciplines (3)\n        { code: 'CL-CIV',  label: 'تشيك ليست مدنية',    labelEn: 'Civil Checklist',    color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',   prefix: 'CL-CIV-',  categoryCode: 'CHECK_LIST' },\n        { code: 'CL-EL',   label: 'تشيك ليست كهربائية', labelEn: 'Electrical Checklist', color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700', prefix: 'CL-EL-',   categoryCode: 'CHECK_LIST' },\n        { code: 'CL-MECH', label: 'تشيك ليست ميكانيكية', labelEn: 'Mechanical Checklist', color: 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700',   prefix: 'CL-MECH-', categoryCode: 'CHECK_LIST' },\n\n        // RFI — same 6 disciplines as TRANSMITTAL (different prefix to keep numbering separate)\n        { code: 'RFI-CIV',  label: 'مدنية',     labelEn: 'Civil',          color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700',   prefix: 'RFI-CIV-',  categoryCode: 'RFI' },\n        { code: 'RFI-EL',   label: 'كهربائية',  labelEn: 'Electrical',     color: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700', prefix: 'RFI-EL-',   categoryCode: 'RFI' },\n        { code: 'RFI-PL',   label: 'صحي',       labelEn: 'Plumbing',       color: 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700',     prefix: 'RFI-PL-',   categoryCode: 'RFI' },\n        { code: 'RFI-HVAC', label: 'تكييف',     labelEn: 'HVAC',           color: 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700',     prefix: 'RFI-HVAC-', categoryCode: 'RFI' },\n        { code: 'RFI-FF',   label: 'حريق',      labelEn: 'Fire Fighting',  color: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700',       prefix: 'RFI-FF-',   categoryCode: 'RFI' },\n        { code: 'RFI-ELVE', label: 'مصاعد',     labelEn: 'Elevators',      color: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700', prefix: 'RFI-ELVE-', categoryCode: 'RFI' },\n\n        // BOOKS — incoming/outgoing letters (2 disciplines)\n        { code: 'IN',  label: 'كتب واردة',  labelEn: 'Incoming Letters', color: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700', prefix: 'IN-',  categoryCode: 'BOOKS' },\n        { code: 'OUT', label: 'كتب صادرة',  labelEn: 'Outgoing Letters', color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',       prefix: 'OUT-', categoryCode: 'BOOKS' },\n      ];\n      for (const d of disciplines) {\n        await db.discipline.upsert({\n          where: { code: d.code },\n          create: d,\n          update: { label: d.label, labelEn: d.labelEn, color: d.color, prefix: d.prefix, categoryCode: d.categoryCode },\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Create doc types (with labelEn)\n      const docTypes = [\n        { code: 'SHOP_DRAWINGS',   label: 'رسم تنفيذي',          labelEn: 'Shop Drawings',         categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'SAMPLE',          label: 'عينة',                labelEn: 'Sample',                categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'SOURCE_APPROVAL', label: 'اعتماد مصدر',          labelEn: 'Source Approval',       categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'TEST_REPORT',     label: 'تقرير اختبار',         labelEn: 'Test Report',           categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'METHOD_STATEMENT',label: 'طريقة تنفيذ',          labelEn: 'Method Statement',      categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'CALCULATION',     label: 'حسابات',              labelEn: 'Calculation',           categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'SPECIFICATION',   label: 'مواصفات',             labelEn: 'Specification',         categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'CATALOG',         label: 'كتالوج',              labelEn: 'Catalog',               categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'AS_BUILT',        label: 'كما نُفذ',             labelEn: 'As Built',              categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n        { code: 'OTHER',           label: 'أخرى',                labelEn: 'Other',                 categoryCode: 'TRANSMITTAL' },\n      ];\n      for (const dt of docTypes) {\n        await db.docType.upsert({\n          where: { code: dt.code },\n          create: dt,\n          update: { label: dt.label, labelEn: dt.labelEn, categoryCode: dt.categoryCode },\n        });\n      }\n\n      console.log('[seed] ✅ Seed complete: 5 categories, 22 disciplines, 10 doc types');\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error('[seed] Error:', e);\n      seedPromise = null; // allow retry\n    }\n  })();\n  return seedPromise;\n}\n\n// Auto-run seed on module load (in production)\nif (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {\n  ensureSeedData().catch(() => {});\n}\n\n/**\n * Ensure DB schema migrations are applied (for SQLite without proper migration tooling).\n * Adds columns that may be missing from older DB files. Safe to call multiple times.\n */\nexport async function ensureMigrations(): Promise<void> {\n  try {\n    // Check if columns exist; if not, ALTER TABLE to add them\n    const colExists = async (table: string, col: string): Promise<boolean> => {\n      try {\n        const result = await db.$queryRawUnsafe(`PRAGMA table_info(\"${table}\")`) as any[];\n        return result.some((r: any) => r.name === col);\n      } catch {\n        return false;\n      }\n    };\n\n    if (!(await colExists('Transmittal', 'alternativeTitle'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Transmittal\" ADD COLUMN \"alternativeTitle\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Transmittal', 'disciplineCode'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Transmittal\" ADD COLUMN \"disciplineCode\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Transmittal', 'parentTransmittalId'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Transmittal\" ADD COLUMN \"parentTransmittalId\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Category', 'labelEn'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Category\" ADD COLUMN \"labelEn\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Category', 'templatePath'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Category\" ADD COLUMN \"templatePath\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Category', 'templateType'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Category\" ADD COLUMN \"templateType\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Discipline', 'labelEn'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Discipline\" ADD COLUMN \"labelEn\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('DocType', 'labelEn'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"DocType\" ADD COLUMN \"labelEn\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('DocType', 'categoryCode'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"DocType\" ADD COLUMN \"categoryCode\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Attachment', 'url'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Attachment\" ADD COLUMN \"url\" TEXT');\n    }\n    if (!(await colExists('Attachment', 'urlSource'))) {\n      await db.$executeRawUnsafe('ALTER TABLE \"Attachment\" ADD COLUMN \"urlSource\" TEXT');\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('igrations] Error:', e);\n  }\n}\n","import { existsSync, mkdirSync } from 'fs';\nimport path from 'path';\nimport os from 'os';\n\n/**\n * Path resolution helpers that work in BOTH dev mode (`next dev`) and\n * production standalone mode (`bun .next/standalone/server.js`).\n *\n * Why this is needed:\n *  - In dev, `process.cwd()` = /home/z/my-project\n *  - In standalone publish, the server may run from .next/standalone/ or the project root\n *  - Files written to `public/` at runtime are NOT served in standalone mode (404!)\n *  - The `scripts/` dir may or may not be inside the standalone bundle\n *\n * Solution: use absolute paths anchored to /home/z/my-project for source assets\n * (scripts, templates), and a dedicated /home/z/my-project/storage dir for\n * runtime-uploaded files (served via /api/files/... API route, not static).\n */\n\n// Absolute anchor to the project source root.\n// This is always correct on the Z.ai platform.\nconst PROJECT_ROOT = '/home/z/my-project';\n\n/**\n * Find the Python script `gen_excel_template.py`.\n * Tries the project root first (always exists in dev & standalone on Z.ai),\n * then falls back to cwd-relative paths.\n */\nexport function findExcelScript(): string {\n  const candidates = [\n    path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'scripts', 'gen_excel_template.py'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), 'scripts', 'gen_excel_template.py'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), '..', '..', 'scripts', 'gen_excel_template.py'),\n  ];\n  for (const c of candidates) {\n    if (existsSync(c)) return c;\n  }\n  return candidates[0]; // default; will fail with a clear error\n}\n\n/**\n * Find the Excel template file.\n */\nexport function findExcelTemplate(): string {\n  const candidates = [\n    path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'public', 'templates', 'TRANSIMITALS_template.xlsx'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'templates', 'TRANSIMITALS_template.xlsx'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), '..', '..', 'public', 'templates', 'TRANSIMITALS_template.xlsx'),\n  ];\n  for (const c of candidates) {\n    if (existsSync(c)) return c;\n  }\n  return candidates[0];\n}\n\n/**\n * Find the Python interpreter. Prefers the venv, falls back to system python3.\n */\nexport function findPython(): string {\n  const candidates = [\n    '/home/z/.venv/bin/python3',\n    '/home/z/.venv/bin/python',\n    '/usr/bin/python3',\n    '/usr/local/bin/python3',\n  ];\n  for (const c of candidates) {\n    if (existsSync(c)) return c;\n  }\n  return 'python3'; // last resort — rely on PATH\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the persistent storage directory for uploaded files.\n * This is OUTSIDE `public/` so it survives rebuilds, and is served via\n * the /api/files/[transmittalId]/[filename] API route (not static serving).\n *\n * Creates the directory if it doesn't exist.\n */\nexport function getStorageRoot(): string {\n  const candidates = [\n    path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'storage'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), 'storage'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), '..', '..', 'storage'),\n  ];\n  for (const c of candidates) {\n    try {\n      mkdirSync(c, { recursive: true });\n      // Verify writable\n      const testFile = path.join(c, `.write-test-${Date.now()}`);\n      try {\n        // Use a simple existence check — mkdirSync already would have thrown\n        return c;\n      } finally {\n        // no-op\n      }\n    } catch {\n      continue;\n    }\n  }\n  // Last resort — use OS temp dir (files will be wiped on reboot, but at least it works)\n  const tmp = path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'transmittal-storage');\n  mkdirSync(tmp, { recursive: true });\n  return tmp;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the IM gateway upload directory (/home/z/my-project/upload).\n *\n * This is where the IM gateway saves pasted images and dropped files\n * (e.g. `pasted_image_1783626027762.png`). These files are NOT under our\n * control — they exist on the server filesystem and may be referenced by\n * users who copied the file_name from an IM message.\n *\n * Returns the absolute path if it exists, otherwise null.\n */\nexport function getImUploadDir(): string | null {\n  const candidates = [\n    path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, 'upload'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), 'upload'),\n    path.join(process.cwd(), '..', '..', 'upload'),\n  ];\n  for (const c of candidates) {\n    if (existsSync(c)) return c;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get the uploads directory for a specific transmittal.\n * Creates it if it doesn't exist.\n */\nexport function getUploadDir(transmittalId: string): string {\n  const dir = path.join(getStorageRoot(), 'uploads', transmittalId);\n  mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\n  return dir;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert an absolute file path on disk to the API URL that serves it.\n * Example: /home/z/my-project/storage/uploads/{id}/123-file.png\n *       →  /api/files/{id}/123-file.png\n */\nexport function filePathToApiUrl(absPath: string): string {\n  const storageRoot = getStorageRoot();\n  const rel = path.relative(storageRoot, absPath);\n  // rel looks like \"uploads/{id}/{filename}\" on all OSes after path.relative\n  const normalized = rel.split(path.sep).filter(Boolean).join('/');\n  return `/api/${normalized}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Convert an API URL like `/api/files/{id}/{filename}` back to the absolute\n * filesystem path. Used by the file-serving route and the delete handler.\n */\nexport function apiUrlToFilePath(apiUrl: string): string {\n  // Strip leading slash, strip leading \"api/\"\n  let rel = apiUrl.replace(/^\\/+/, '');\n  if (rel.startsWith('api/')) rel = rel.slice(4);\n  // Now rel = \"uploads/{id}/{filename}\" or \"files/{id}/{filename}\"\n  // We normalize \"files/\" → \"uploads/\" for backwards compatibility with old records\n  if (rel.startsWith('files/')) rel = 'uploads/' + rel.slice(6);\n  return path.join(getStorageRoot(), rel);\n}\n\n/**\n * Migrate a legacy `filePath` (from when we stored files in /public/uploads/...)\n * to the new API URL format. Returns the original if it's not a legacy path.\n */\nexport function migrateLegacyFilePath(filePath: string): string {\n  if (!filePath) return filePath;\n  // Old format: /uploads/{id}/{filename}\n  if (filePath.startsWith('/uploads/')) {\n    const rel = filePath.slice(1); // \"uploads/{id}/{filename}\"\n    const parts = rel.split('/');\n    if (parts.length >= 3) {\n      const transmittalId = parts[1];\n      const filename = parts.slice(2).join('/');\n      return `/api/files/${transmittalId}/${filename}`;\n    }\n  }\n  return filePath;\n}\n","import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { db } from '@/lib/db';\nimport { writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises';\nimport { existsSync } from 'fs';\nimport path from 'path';\nimport { getStorageRoot, getUploadDir, filePathToApiUrl } from '@/lib/paths';\n\nexport const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';\n\n/**\n * POST /api/transmittals/[id]/upload\n *\n * Two modes:\n *  1. multipart/form-data — file upload (field name: \"file\")\n *     Saves the file to storage/uploads/{transmittalId}/{filename}\n *     Each transmittal gets its OWN folder named by its reference (sanitized).\n *\n *  2. application/json — link attachment (url, fileName, urlSource)\n *     No file is saved; only a database record is created.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n\n  // Verify transmittal exists\n  const t = await db.transmittal.findUnique({ where: { id } });\n  if (!t) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'الترانسميتال غير موجود' }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const contentType = req.headers.get('content-type') || '';\n\n  // Mode 2: JSON (link attachment)\n  if (contentType.includes('application/json')) {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { url, fileName, urlSource } = body;\n    if (!url || !fileName) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'URL and fileName are required' }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    const att = await db.attachment.create({\n      data: {\n        transmittalId: id,\n        fileName: String(fileName).trim(),\n        filePath: '',\n        fileType: '',\n        fileSize: 0,\n        url: String(url).trim(),\n        urlSource: urlSource || 'link',\n      },\n    });\n    return NextResponse.json(att, { status: 201 });\n  }\n\n  // Mode 1: multipart/form-data (file upload)\n  if (!contentType.includes('multipart/form-data')) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unsupported content type' }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const form = await req.formData();\n  const file = form.get('file') as File | null;\n  if (!file || !(file instanceof File) || file.size === 0) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No file provided' }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Sanitize filename — keep extension, replace problematic chars\n  const safeName = String(file.name)\n    .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*\\x00-\\x1f]/g, '_')\n    .replace(/\\s+/g, '_')\n    .slice(0, 200);\n\n  // Build folder path: {customPath or storageRoot}/uploads/{categoryCode}/{disciplineCode}/{transmittalId}/\n  // If user chose a custom save path via Electron dialog, use it; otherwise use default storage\n  const categoryCode = t.category || 'TRANSMITTAL';\n  const disciplineCode = t.disciplineCode || t.discipline || 'UNKNOWN';\n  // Check for custom storage path (set by Electron IPC or env var)\n  const customPath = process.env.CUSTOM_STORAGE_PATH || '';\n  const storageRoot = customPath || getStorageRoot();\n  const uploadDir = path.join(storageRoot, 'uploads', categoryCode, disciplineCode, id);\n  if (!existsSync(uploadDir)) {\n    await mkdir(uploadDir, { recursive: true });\n  }\n\n  // Avoid filename collisions — if exists, append counter\n  let finalName = safeName;\n  let counter = 1;\n  while (existsSync(path.join(uploadDir, finalName))) {\n    const ext = path.extname(safeName);\n    const base = path.basename(safeName, ext);\n    finalName = `${base}_${counter}${ext}`;\n    counter++;\n  }\n\n  const absPath = path.join(uploadDir, finalName);\n  const bytes = new Uint8Array(await file.arrayBuffer());\n  await writeFile(absPath, bytes);\n\n  // Build API URL for serving — use /api/files/{transmittalId}/{filename}\n  // This matches the existing /api/files/[transmittalId]/[filename] route\n  const apiUrl = `/api/files/${id}/${finalName}`;\n\n  // Save attachment record in DB\n  const att = await db.attachment.create({\n    data: {\n      transmittalId: id,\n      fileName: file.name, // keep original name in DB for display\n      filePath: apiUrl,\n      fileType: file.type || path.extname(file.name).slice(1),\n      fileSize: file.size,\n      url: null,\n      urlSource: null,\n    },\n  });\n\n  return NextResponse.json(att, { status: 201 });\n}\n","import { AppRouteRouteModule } from \"next/dist/esm/server/route-modules/app-route/module.compiled\";\nimport { RouteKind } from \"next/dist/esm/server/route-kind\";\nimport { patchFetch as _patchFetch } from \"next/dist/esm/server/lib/patch-fetch\";\nimport { addRequestMeta, getRequestMeta } from \"next/dist/esm/server/request-meta\";\nimport { getTracer, SpanKind } from \"next/dist/esm/server/lib/trace/tracer\";\nimport { setManifestsSingleton } from \"next/dist/esm/server/app-render/manifests-singleton\";\nimport { normalizeAppPath } from \"next/dist/esm/shared/lib/router/utils/app-paths\";\nimport { NodeNextRequest, NodeNextResponse } from \"next/dist/esm/server/base-http/node\";\nimport { NextRequestAdapter, signalFromNodeResponse } from \"next/dist/esm/server/web/spec-extension/adapters/next-request\";\nimport { BaseServerSpan } from \"next/dist/esm/server/lib/trace/constants\";\nimport { getRevalidateReason } from \"next/dist/esm/server/instrumentation/utils\";\nimport { sendResponse } from \"next/dist/esm/server/send-response\";\nimport { fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders, toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders } from \"next/dist/esm/server/web/utils\";\nimport { getCacheControlHeader } from \"next/dist/esm/server/lib/cache-control\";\nimport { INFINITE_CACHE, NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER } from \"next/dist/esm/lib/constants\";\nimport { NoFallbackError } from \"next/dist/esm/shared/lib/no-fallback-error.external\";\nimport { CachedRouteKind } from \"next/dist/esm/server/response-cache\";\nimport * as userland from \"INNER_APP_ROUTE\";\n// We inject the nextConfigOutput here so that we can use them in the route\n// module.\nconst nextConfigOutput = \"standalone\"\nconst routeModule = new AppRouteRouteModule({\n    definition: {\n        kind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n        page: \"/api/transmittals/[id]/upload/route\",\n        pathname: \"/api/transmittals/[id]/upload\",\n        filename: \"route\",\n        bundlePath: \"\"\n    },\n    distDir: process.env.__NEXT_RELATIVE_DIST_DIR || '',\n    relativeProjectDir: process.env.__NEXT_RELATIVE_PROJECT_DIR || '',\n    resolvedPagePath: \"[project]/src/app/api/transmittals/[id]/upload/route.ts\",\n    nextConfigOutput,\n    userland\n});\n// Pull out the exports that we need to expose from the module. This should\n// be eliminated when we've moved the other routes to the new format. These\n// are used to hook into the route.\nconst { workAsyncStorage, workUnitAsyncStorage, serverHooks } = routeModule;\nfunction patchFetch() {\n    return _patchFetch({\n        workAsyncStorage,\n        workUnitAsyncStorage\n    });\n}\nexport { routeModule, workAsyncStorage, workUnitAsyncStorage, serverHooks, patchFetch,  };\nexport async function handler(req, res, ctx) {\n    if (routeModule.isDev) {\n        addRequestMeta(req, 'devRequestTimingInternalsEnd', process.hrtime.bigint());\n    }\n    let srcPage = \"/api/transmittals/[id]/upload/route\";\n    // turbopack doesn't normalize `/index` in the page name\n    // so we need to to process dynamic routes properly\n    // TODO: fix turbopack providing differing value from webpack\n    if (process.env.TURBOPACK) {\n        srcPage = srcPage.replace(/\\/index$/, '') || '/';\n    } else if (srcPage === '/index') {\n        // we always normalize /index specifically\n        srcPage = '/';\n    }\n    const multiZoneDraftMode = process.env.__NEXT_MULTI_ZONE_DRAFT_MODE;\n    const prepareResult = await routeModule.prepare(req, res, {\n        srcPage,\n        multiZoneDraftMode\n    });\n    if (!prepareResult) {\n        res.statusCode = 400;\n        res.end('Bad Request');\n        ctx.waitUntil == null ? void 0 : ctx.waitUntil.call(ctx, Promise.resolve());\n        return null;\n    }\n    const { buildId, params, nextConfig, parsedUrl, isDraftMode, prerenderManifest, routerServerContext, isOnDemandRevalidate, revalidateOnlyGenerated, resolvedPathname, clientReferenceManifest, serverActionsManifest } = prepareResult;\n    const normalizedSrcPage = normalizeAppPath(srcPage);\n    let isIsr = Boolean(prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage] || prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname]);\n    const render404 = async ()=>{\n        // TODO: should route-module itself handle rendering the 404\n        if (routerServerContext == null ? void 0 : routerServerContext.render404) {\n            await routerServerContext.render404(req, res, parsedUrl, false);\n        } else {\n            res.end('This page could not be found');\n        }\n        return null;\n    };\n    if (isIsr && !isDraftMode) {\n        const isPrerendered = Boolean(prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname]);\n        const prerenderInfo = prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage];\n        if (prerenderInfo) {\n            if (prerenderInfo.fallback === false && !isPrerendered) {\n                if (nextConfig.experimental.adapterPath) {\n                    return await render404();\n                }\n                throw new NoFallbackError();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    let cacheKey = null;\n    if (isIsr && !routeModule.isDev && !isDraftMode) {\n        cacheKey = resolvedPathname;\n        // ensure /index and / is normalized to one key\n        cacheKey = cacheKey === '/index' ? '/' : cacheKey;\n    }\n    const supportsDynamicResponse = // If we're in development, we always support dynamic HTML\n    routeModule.isDev === true || // If this is not SSG or does not have static paths, then it supports\n    // dynamic HTML.\n    !isIsr;\n    // This is a revalidation request if the request is for a static\n    // page and it is not being resumed from a postponed render and\n    // it is not a dynamic RSC request then it is a revalidation\n    // request.\n    const isStaticGeneration = isIsr && !supportsDynamicResponse;\n    // Before rendering (which initializes component tree modules), we have to\n    // set the reference manifests to our global store so Server Action's\n    // encryption util can access to them at the top level of the page module.\n    if (serverActionsManifest && clientReferenceManifest) {\n        setManifestsSingleton({\n            page: srcPage,\n            clientReferenceManifest,\n            serverActionsManifest\n        });\n    }\n    const method = req.method || 'GET';\n    const tracer = getTracer();\n    const activeSpan = tracer.getActiveScopeSpan();\n    const context = {\n        params,\n        prerenderManifest,\n        renderOpts: {\n            experimental: {\n                authInterrupts: Boolean(nextConfig.experimental.authInterrupts)\n            },\n            cacheComponents: Boolean(nextConfig.cacheComponents),\n            supportsDynamicResponse,\n            incrementalCache: getRequestMeta(req, 'incrementalCache'),\n            cacheLifeProfiles: nextConfig.cacheLife,\n            waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n            onClose: (cb)=>{\n                res.on('close', cb);\n            },\n            onAfterTaskError: undefined,\n            onInstrumentationRequestError: (error, _request, errorContext, silenceLog)=>routeModule.onRequestError(req, error, errorContext, silenceLog, routerServerContext)\n        },\n        sharedContext: {\n            buildId\n        }\n    };\n    const nodeNextReq = new NodeNextRequest(req);\n    const nodeNextRes = new NodeNextResponse(res);\n    const nextReq = NextRequestAdapter.fromNodeNextRequest(nodeNextReq, signalFromNodeResponse(res));\n    try {\n        const invokeRouteModule = async (span)=>{\n            return routeModule.handle(nextReq, context).finally(()=>{\n                if (!span) return;\n                span.setAttributes({\n                    'http.status_code': res.statusCode,\n                    'next.rsc': false\n                });\n                const rootSpanAttributes = tracer.getRootSpanAttributes();\n                // We were unable to get attributes, probably OTEL is not enabled\n                if (!rootSpanAttributes) {\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type') !== BaseServerSpan.handleRequest) {\n                    console.warn(`Unexpected root span type '${rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type')}'. Please report this Next.js issue https://github.com/vercel/next.js`);\n                    return;\n                }\n                const route = rootSpanAttributes.get('next.route');\n                if (route) {\n                    const name = `${method} ${route}`;\n                    span.setAttributes({\n                        'next.route': route,\n                        'http.route': route,\n                        'next.span_name': name\n                    });\n                    span.updateName(name);\n                } else {\n                    span.updateName(`${method} ${srcPage}`);\n                }\n            });\n        };\n        const isMinimalMode = Boolean(process.env.MINIMAL_MODE || getRequestMeta(req, 'minimalMode'));\n        const handleResponse = async (currentSpan)=>{\n            var _cacheEntry_value;\n            const responseGenerator = async ({ previousCacheEntry })=>{\n                try {\n                    if (!isMinimalMode && isOnDemandRevalidate && revalidateOnlyGenerated && !previousCacheEntry) {\n                        res.statusCode = 404;\n                        // on-demand revalidate always sets this header\n                        res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', 'REVALIDATED');\n                        res.end('This page could not be found');\n                        return null;\n                    }\n                    const response = await invokeRouteModule(currentSpan);\n                    req.fetchMetrics = context.renderOpts.fetchMetrics;\n                    let pendingWaitUntil = context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil;\n                    // Attempt using provided waitUntil if available\n                    // if it's not we fallback to sendResponse's handling\n                    if (pendingWaitUntil) {\n                        if (ctx.waitUntil) {\n                            ctx.waitUntil(pendingWaitUntil);\n                            pendingWaitUntil = undefined;\n                        }\n                    }\n                    const cacheTags = context.renderOpts.collectedTags;\n                    // If the request is for a static response, we can cache it so long\n                    // as it's not edge.\n                    if (isIsr) {\n                        const blob = await response.blob();\n                        // Copy the headers from the response.\n                        const headers = toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(response.headers);\n                        if (cacheTags) {\n                            headers[NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER] = cacheTags;\n                        }\n                        if (!headers['content-type'] && blob.type) {\n                            headers['content-type'] = blob.type;\n                        }\n                        const revalidate = typeof context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate === 'undefined' || context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate >= INFINITE_CACHE ? false : context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate;\n                        const expire = typeof context.renderOpts.collectedExpire === 'undefined' || context.renderOpts.collectedExpire >= INFINITE_CACHE ? undefined : context.renderOpts.collectedExpire;\n                        // Create the cache entry for the response.\n                        const cacheEntry = {\n                            value: {\n                                kind: CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                                status: response.status,\n                                body: Buffer.from(await blob.arrayBuffer()),\n                                headers\n                            },\n                            cacheControl: {\n                                revalidate,\n                                expire\n                            }\n                        };\n                        return cacheEntry;\n                    } else {\n                        // send response without caching if not ISR\n                        await sendResponse(nodeNextReq, nodeNextRes, response, context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil);\n                        return null;\n                    }\n                } catch (err) {\n                    // if this is a background revalidate we need to report\n                    // the request error here as it won't be bubbled\n                    if (previousCacheEntry == null ? void 0 : previousCacheEntry.isStale) {\n                        const silenceLog = false;\n                        await routeModule.onRequestError(req, err, {\n                            routerKind: 'App Router',\n                            routePath: srcPage,\n                            routeType: 'route',\n                            revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n                                isStaticGeneration,\n                                isOnDemandRevalidate\n                            })\n                        }, silenceLog, routerServerContext);\n                    }\n                    throw err;\n                }\n            };\n            const cacheEntry = await routeModule.handleResponse({\n                req,\n                nextConfig,\n                cacheKey,\n                routeKind: RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                isFallback: false,\n                prerenderManifest,\n                isRoutePPREnabled: false,\n                isOnDemandRevalidate,\n                revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n                responseGenerator,\n                waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n                isMinimalMode\n            });\n            // we don't create a cacheEntry for ISR\n            if (!isIsr) {\n                return null;\n            }\n            if ((cacheEntry == null ? void 0 : (_cacheEntry_value = cacheEntry.value) == null ? void 0 : _cacheEntry_value.kind) !== CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE) {\n                var _cacheEntry_value1;\n                throw Object.defineProperty(new Error(`Invariant: app-route received invalid cache entry ${cacheEntry == null ? void 0 : (_cacheEntry_value1 = cacheEntry.value) == null ? void 0 : _cacheEntry_value1.kind}`), \"__NEXT_ERROR_CODE\", {\n                    value: \"E701\",\n                    enumerable: false,\n                    configurable: true\n                });\n            }\n            if (!isMinimalMode) {\n                res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', isOnDemandRevalidate ? 'REVALIDATED' : cacheEntry.isMiss ? 'MISS' : cacheEntry.isStale ? 'STALE' : 'HIT');\n            }\n            // Draft mode should never be cached\n            if (isDraftMode) {\n                res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'private, no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate');\n            }\n            const headers = fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders(cacheEntry.value.headers);\n            if (!(isMinimalMode && isIsr)) {\n                headers.delete(NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER);\n            }\n            // If cache control is already set on the response we don't\n            // override it to allow users to customize it via next.config\n            if (cacheEntry.cacheControl && !res.getHeader('Cache-Control') && !headers.get('Cache-Control')) {\n                headers.set('Cache-Control', getCacheControlHeader(cacheEntry.cacheControl));\n            }\n            await sendResponse(nodeNextReq, nodeNextRes, // @ts-expect-error - Argument of type 'Buffer<ArrayBufferLike>' is not assignable to parameter of type 'BodyInit | null | undefined'.\n            new Response(cacheEntry.value.body, {\n                headers,\n                status: cacheEntry.value.status || 200\n            }));\n            return null;\n        };\n        // TODO: activeSpan code path is for when wrapped by\n        // next-server can be removed when this is no longer used\n        if (activeSpan) {\n            await handleResponse(activeSpan);\n        } else {\n            await tracer.withPropagatedContext(req.headers, ()=>tracer.trace(BaseServerSpan.handleRequest, {\n                    spanName: `${method} ${srcPage}`,\n                    kind: SpanKind.SERVER,\n                    attributes: {\n                        'http.method': method,\n                        'http.target': req.url\n                    }\n                }, handleResponse));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        if (!(err instanceof NoFallbackError)) {\n            const silenceLog = false;\n            await routeModule.onRequestError(req, err, {\n                routerKind: 'App Router',\n                routePath: normalizedSrcPage,\n                routeType: 'route',\n                revalidateReason: getRevalidateReason({\n                    isStaticGeneration,\n                    isOnDemandRevalidate\n                })\n            }, silenceLog, routerServerContext);\n        }\n        // rethrow so that we can handle serving error page\n        // If this is during static generation, throw the error again.\n        if (isIsr) throw err;\n        // Otherwise, send a 500 response.\n        await sendResponse(nodeNextReq, nodeNextRes, new Response(null, {\n            status: 500\n        }));\n        return null;\n    }\n}\n\n//# sourceMappingURL=app-route.js.map\n"],"names":[],"mappings":"omCAAA,IAAA,EAAA,EAAA,CAAA,CAAA,OAMO,IAAM,EACX,AALsB,WAKN,MAAM,EACtB,IAAI,EAAA,YAAY,CAAC,CACf,IAAK,CAAC,QAAQ,AAChB,GAYE,EAAoC,KA8GjC,eAAe,IACpB,GAAI,CAEF,IAAM,EAAY,MAAO,EAAe,KACtC,GAAI,CAEF,MAAO,CADQ,MAAM,EAAG,eAAe,CAAC,CAAC,mBAAmB,EAAE,EAAM,EAAE,EAAC,EACzD,IAAI,CAAE,AAAD,GAAY,EAAE,IAAI,GAAK,EAC5C,CAAE,KAAM,CACN,OAAO,CACT,CACF,CAEI,AAAE,OAAM,EAAU,cAAe,qBAAsB,AACzD,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,gEAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,cAAe,mBAAoB,AACvD,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,8DAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,cAAe,wBAAyB,AAC5D,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,mEAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,WAAY,YAAa,AAC7C,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,oDAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,WAAY,iBAAkB,AAClD,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,yDAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,WAAY,iBAAkB,AAClD,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,yDAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,aAAc,YAAa,AAC/C,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,sDAEvB,AAAF,MAAQ,EAAU,UAAW,YAAa,AAC5C,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,mDAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,UAAW,iBAAkB,AACjD,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,wDAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,aAAc,QAAS,AAC3C,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,kDAEzB,AAAE,MAAM,EAAU,aAAc,cAAe,AACjD,MAAM,EAAG,iBAAiB,CAAC,uDAE/B,CAAE,MAAO,EAAG,CACV,QAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,sBAAuB,EACvC,CACF,CAvDE,CArGK,eAAe,WACpB,AAAI,IACJ,EAAc,CAAC,MADE,IAEf,GAFsB,AAElB,CAGF,GAAI,AADc,MAAM,EAAG,UAAU,CAAC,KAAK,GAC3B,EAAG,OAYnB,CAZ2B,GAYtB,IAAM,KAVX,EAUkB,GAZ0B,GAEpC,GAAG,CAAC,CAUkB,kDAPX,CACjB,CAAE,KAAM,cAAe,MAAO,aAAc,QAAS,cAAe,KAAM,KAAM,MAAO,4BAA6B,aAAc,6BAA8B,aAAc,MAAO,EACrL,CAAE,KAAM,MAAe,MAAO,aAAc,QAAS,sBAAuB,KAAM,KAAM,MAAO,gCAAiC,aAAc,qBAAsB,aAAc,MAAO,EACzL,CAAE,KAAM,aAAe,MAAO,YAAc,QAAS,aAAc,KAAM,IAAK,MAAO,4BAA6B,aAAc,4BAA6B,aAAc,MAAO,EAClL,CAAE,KAAM,MAAe,MAAO,cAAe,QAAS,0BAA2B,KAAM,IAAK,MAAO,6BAA8B,EACjI,CAAE,KAAM,QAAe,MAAO,MAAe,QAAS,UAAW,KAAM,KAAM,MAAO,kCAAmC,aAAc,uBAAwB,aAAc,MAAO,EACnL,EAEC,MAAM,EAAG,QAAQ,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,CACvB,MAAO,CAAE,KAAM,EAAI,IAAI,AAAC,EACxB,OAAQ,EACR,OAAQ,CAAE,MAAO,EAAI,KAAK,CAAE,QAAS,EAAI,OAAO,CAAE,KAAM,EAAI,IAAI,CAAE,MAAO,EAAI,KAAK,CAAE,GAAI,EAAI,YAAY,CAAG,CAAE,aAAc,EAAI,YAAY,CAAE,aAAc,EAAI,YAAY,AAAC,EAAI,CAAC,CAAC,AAAE,CACtL,GAsCF,IAAK,IAAM
